# TASKS: #181 — Create ux-review recipe
<!-- Generated by start-feature-planning | Plan sub-agent output -->

**Intent:** Implement the ux-review recipe through granular, dependency-ordered tasks

```

                                                        │

  depends on: T4                    │   T1-T7            │

  depends on: T2                                        │
```

## Task Breakdown

### T1: Write intent.yaml for ux-review
- **Files:** `core/components/recipes/ux-review/reference/intent.yaml` (create)
- **Details:** Encode C1-C10 (URL accessible, features exist, multi-viewport, axe-core JSON, observed tokens, vendor-abstracted, features.yaml schema, human checkpoint, screenshot refs, persona mapping). F1-F7 (no epics, no observed tokens, narrative a11y, vendor lock-in, no refs, schema mismatch, skipped checkpoint). S1-S5 (Designer, Product Owner, Engineer, Accessibility Auditor, Design Lead personas).
- **Depends on:** None
- **Expected Outcome:** Valid intent.yaml with all IDD fields
- **Verification:** All C/F/S IDs present, each falsifiable

### T2: Create design-epics.yaml schema
- **Files:** `core/components/skills/draft-design-epics/schemas/design-epics.yaml` (create)
- **Details:** Mirror features.yaml schema + design-specific additions: `type: "design-epic"`, `source_audit_ref`, `screenshot_refs[]`, `accessibility_refs[]`, `design_tokens_ref`. ID prefix convention `DE{N}`. All standard features.yaml fields preserved.
- **Depends on:** None
- **Expected Outcome:** Schema that prepare-implementation can consume
- **Verification:** Diff against features.yaml — all required fields present, design fields additive

### T3: Create capture-screenshots skill
- **Files:** `core/components/skills/capture-screenshots/SKILL.md` (create)
- **Details:** Playwright-based screenshot capture across multiple viewports. Reads features.yaml for scenarios, product.yaml for persona mapping. Integrates `@axe-core/playwright` for accessibility. Outputs screenshot-manifest.yaml with paths, viewport info, persona mapping, per-screenshot a11y summary.
- **Depends on:** None
- **Expected Outcome:** Given URL + features.yaml → directory of screenshots + a11y JSON
- **Verification:** 3 features × 2 viewports → 6+ screenshots + 6+ a11y reports

### T4: Create analyze-ux-audit skill
- **Files:** `core/components/skills/analyze-ux-audit/SKILL.md` (create)
- **Details:** Analyzes screenshots for visual patterns (colors, typography, spacing, components). Reads axe-core JSON for measurable accessibility data. Cross-references with PP-2/QP-6 from product.yaml. Outputs ux-audit-report.yaml with per-screen analysis and cross-screen summary.
- **Depends on:** T3 (needs screenshot manifest schema)
- **Expected Outcome:** Structured audit report grounded in actual screenshots and measured data
- **Verification:** Every screen entry has non-empty screenshot_refs, non-null violation_count, extracted colors

### T5: Create propose-design-system skill
- **Files:** `core/components/skills/propose-design-system/SKILL.md` (create)
- **Details:** Derives 2-3 design system options (Refine/Evolve/Transform) from observed visual state. Defines concrete tokens per option: colors with WCAG contrast ratios, typography with rem values, spacing scale, border radius, shadows, component patterns. Supports `user_preferences` for Orbit re-invocation.
- **Depends on:** T4 (needs audit report schema)
- **Expected Outcome:** Design system proposal with concrete, implementable tokens
- **Verification:** Every color has computed contrast ratio. "Refine" option preserves dominant colors from audit.

### T6: Create generate-design-inspiration skill
- **Files:** `core/components/skills/generate-design-inspiration/SKILL.md` (create)
- **Details:** Vendor-abstracted image generation. `config.provider` selects backend at runtime. Supports "skip" provider for CI/testing (placeholder SVG). No vendor SDK imports in skill code. Environment variables for API keys.
- **Depends on:** None
- **Expected Outcome:** Abstraction layer — invoke with provider="skip" → valid placeholder
- **Verification:** SKILL.md has zero vendor-specific imports. "skip" provider produces valid output.

### T7: Create draft-design-epics skill
- **Files:** `core/components/skills/draft-design-epics/SKILL.md` (create)
- **Details:** Maps audit findings to design epics by category (accessibility, visual consistency, responsive, component). Each epic: DE{N} ID, back-links to original features, screenshot_refs, accessibility_refs, measurable success_scenarios, concrete behaviors with CSS/component changes. Consolidates cross-screen issues.
- **Depends on:** T2 (needs schema)
- **Expected Outcome:** design-epics.yaml consumable by prepare-implementation
- **Verification:** Every epic has screenshot_ref, measurable success_scenario, features.yaml field compliance

### T8: Compile ux-review SKILL.md (via /create-recipe --rebake)
- **Files:** `core/components/recipes/ux-review/SKILL.md` (create)
- **Details:** L2 Structure A recipe. Pre-flight → Preparation (Steps 1-4: capture, analyze, propose, brief) → Checkpoint (Step 5: Tether/Orbit/Vanish) → Execution (Steps 6-7: inspiration, design epics) → Scenario Validation (Step 8) → Evidence (Steps 9-10). Agent boundary: tech-designer (3 domain calls), product-strategist (1 domain call). doc-builder + repo-orchestrator utility.
- **Depends on:** T1, T2, T3, T4, T5, T6, T7
- **Expected Outcome:** Complete compiled recipe with all required sections per ADR 013
- **Verification:** intent_hash matches, all C/F/S covered, all steps have JSON contracts

### T9: Modify existing agent definitions
- **Files:** `core/components/agents/tech-designer.md`, `product-strategist.md`, `doc-builder.md` (modify)
- **Details:** tech-designer: add capture-screenshots, analyze-ux-audit, propose-design-system, generate-design-inspiration to skill pool. product-strategist: add draft-design-epics. doc-builder: add ux-review brief type.
- **Depends on:** T3, T4, T5, T6, T7
- **Expected Outcome:** Agents reference all new skills
- **Verification:** G5 + G6 pass on /create-recipe --review

### T10: Create UX review brief template
- **Files:** `core/components/memory/standards/templates/ux-review-brief.html` (create)
- **Details:** Phoenix Design System HTML template. Sections: screenshot gallery (desktop/mobile side-by-side), accessibility report table (by severity), design system options (tabbed), checkpoint controls. Client-side rendering via brief-render.js + ux-review-data.json.
- **Depends on:** T4, T5
- **Expected Outcome:** Self-contained HTML brief that renders from JSON data
- **Verification:** Uses Phoenix CSS variables, loads via brief-render.js, renders all 4 sections

### T11: Run /create-recipe --review and fix gaps
- **Files:** All from T1-T10 (verified)
- **Details:** Run G1-G11 gap analysis. Fix any gaps found. Re-run until 11/11 PASS.
- **Depends on:** T8, T9, T10
- **Expected Outcome:** 11/11 gap checks pass
- **Verification:** review-report.md shows all PASS

## Execution Strategy

**Wave 1 (parallel):** T1, T2, T3, T6 — no dependencies
**Wave 2 (parallel after T3):** T4 — needs T3
**Wave 3 (parallel after T2, T4):** T5, T7 — need T4 and T2 respectively
**Wave 4 (parallel after T3-T7):** T9, T10 — need skills defined
**Wave 5 (serial):** T8 — needs T1-T7
**Wave 6 (serial):** T11 — needs T8-T10
